entries.mnemonic: simul(相同)+taneous→相同时间发生的→同时的

senses.example: There will be a simultaneous broadcast of the game on TV and radio.
senses.example_zh: 比赛将同时在电视和广播中进行转播。

senses.example: Peter was a foolish man, full of impractical plans.
senses.example_zh: 彼特是一个蠢人,满脑子都是不切实际的想法。

entries.mnemonic: ob(near)+vi(道路)+ous→靠近路边,容易看见→明显的

senses.example: It was obvious that he was drunk.

senses.def_en: done or said in a natural and often sudden way and without a lot of thought or planning
senses.example: He made a spontaneous offer of help.

entries.mnemonic: sub(under)+stan(站)+ce→立于表象之下的东西→实质

senses.example: Celery contains a valuable chemical substance that helps lower blood pressure.
senses.example_zh: 芹菜里含有一种宝贵的能帮助降低血压的化学物质。

senses.example: There is no substance in your argument.
senses.example_zh: 你的争论没有实质性内容。

senses.def_en: the most important ideas contained in an argument or piece of writing

senses.example: The commission's report gives substance to these allegations.
senses.example_zh: 委员会的报告为这些说法提供了事实根据。

senses.def_en: considerable in importance, value, degree, amount, or extent
senses.example: substantial reasons // We will place an order with substantial amount on this item.
senses.example_zh: 充足的理由 // 我方将下订单大量订购这项产品。

senses.example: The house is substantial to last a hundred years.
senses.example_zh: 这幢房子非常坚实,足够使用一百年。

senses.example: The scientists plan to make synthetic genes and reassemble them to design new species.
senses.example_zh: 科学家计划合成基因后将其重组以产生新物种。

senses.def_en: sth. that is made by combining different things
senses.example: Their beliefs are a synthesis of Eastern and Western religions.
senses.example_zh: 他们的信仰是东西方宗教的综合体。

senses.example: Humans need some sunlight for the synthesis of vitamin D which takes place in the skin.
senses.example_zh: 人需要阳光才能在皮肤里合成维生素 D。

derivatives: synthesize v. 用合成法制造;合成

senses.def_en: offensive or rude, esp. in a sexual way
senses.example_zh: 不要开这些粗俗的玩笑。

senses.def_en: being in an unrefined or natural state

extras.content: Nearly all college texts and many high school and junior high books will be tied to Internet sites that provide source material, study exercises, and relevant news articles to aid in learning. 译文:几乎所有的大学课文和许多初高中课本都将联网。那些网址会提供学习材料、练习、相关的新闻报道以促进学习。
